error.morning_azimuth_order: Morning azimuths must be in increasing order: free <= shade start <= shade end <= recover.
error.afternoon_elevation_order: Afternoon elevations must be in decreasing order: high >= mid >= low >= deep >= end.

user.title: Adaptive Solar Forecast
user.description: Create a forecast sensor that applies a shading model on top of an existing solar forecast.

data.name: Name
data.actual_production_entity: Actual production entity — raw PV/solar power (for calibration)
data.ac_output_entity: AC output entity (optional; the clip is applied to this, not raw PV)
data.calibration_clip_watts: AC output curtailment clip in watts (samples at/above are excluded)

advanced.title: Shading model
advanced.description: Tune the morning azimuth sector and afternoon elevation fade.

data.after_solar_noon_only: Only apply afternoon damping after solar noon

calibrate.name: Calibrate from history
calibrate.description: Analyze Recorder history to derive observed shading factors by comparing the base forecast against actual production. Curtailed samples are excluded. Returns suggestions only; the configured model is never changed.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: Which Adaptive Solar Forecast entry to calibrate. Required only when several exist.

days.name: History window (days)
days.description: Number of past days of Recorder history to analyze. Defaults to the configured value.
